channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.4.1
item.description:
## What's New

### 🗂️ Remove Agent from ClawDeck (Agent Settings)
- **"Remove from ClawDeck"** button in Agent Settings → Danger Zone
- Hides the agent locally — it keeps running on the gateway and can be re-added from the sidebar "+" button
- Clear separation from **"Delete Agent"** which removes the agent from the gateway entirely
- Confirmation dialog explains the difference

### Also includes (from v1.4.0)
- Agents tab in Settings (⌘,) listing all agent bindings

---
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1devstudio/clawdeck/compare/v1.4.0...v1.4.1
